3265190.name: Odd Job
3265190.description:
ODD JOB is a modern take on the 90-degree, tile-based, RPG dungeon crawler genre. With old-school vibes and fresh rogue-like mechanics, it combines classic gameplay with a new and immersive twist.

You are part of Human Fist, a revolutionary group fighting to stop robots from taking human jobs. Infiltrate Human Robotics and delve deeper into enemy territory as you battle machines and uncover the company's true secret.

Key Features

  • Deep Tactical Turn-Based Combat:
    Every action counts, and every encounter will test your ability to think ahead and adapt to your environment. Utilize a range of tools, weapons, and special abilities as you take care of pesky enemies.

  • Explore Procedurally Generated Dungeons from Handcrafted Rooms:
    Each run is unique, with dungeons procedurally generated from a selection of carefully hand-designed rooms. From winding corridors to eerie labs and sinister offices, you’ll need to adapt to new environments, solve puzzles, and confront unexpected challenges.

  • Extensive Item Collection and Stats Customization:
    The game features a wide variety of items that you can find, equip, and use to enhance your character’s stats and abilities. From weapons to armor, every item plays a role in shaping your playstyle and boosting your performance.

  • Customize Your Runs with Punch Cards:
    Use Punch Cards to customize the items, rooms, and challenges you’ll encounter in your next run. From ensuring access to rare weapons to unlocking specific room types, Punch Cards give you control over what you are about to discover.

  • Uncover The Mysteries Of The Complex:
    The deeper you explore, the more you’ll discover about the strange and sinister operations happening within HR Inc. From cryptic notes to hidden rooms and locked laboratories, each clue helps piece together the company’s dark history—and why you can’t seem to escape.

  • Team Up with Unique NPCs:
    Throughout your journey, you’ll encounter a variety of unique NPCs, each with their own backstory, abilities, and motivations. Some may offer to join your party, bringing special skills and advantages that can change the course of your run.

英语*
